revision.comment: preventing noindexing caused by three example transclusions
1 revision imported: mass importing from wikipedia
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Userspace linking templates]] <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Userspace linking templates]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Userspace linking templates]] <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Userspace linking templates]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]</noinclude>"

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Userspace linking templates]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects U
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
